title: General inquiries - Bank of Canada
content:
Before contacting us, find out how we can and can’t help you.
- For a list of federally regulated financial institutions, see the Office of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions website.
- For general information about banking services in Canada, see the Canadian Bankers Association website.
No need to call us — you can do the following right here on our website:
- Look up exchange rates and financial statistics .
- Access information, services and resource materials about Canadian bank notes .
- Learn about monetary policy .
- Locate educational materials , publications and research .
- Explore how the Bank supervises retail payment activities and payment service providers.
- Learn how to apply for a settlement account for Payments Canada payment systems and explore related policies.

### Unclaimed Properties Office (UPO)
Visit the UPO website to:
- Search for and claim unclaimed bank balances.
- Check the status of a claim.
- Learn how and where to redeem your Canada Savings Bonds.
Our web application for applicants and registered payment service providers.

#### For questions related to the registration application form or process
- Email RPS Compliance

#### For technical issues with PSP Connect
- Complete our online form

#### For general inquiries about RPS
- Complete our online form
Here are other resources that may be able to help:
- We can’t resolve problems with your commercial bank. Refer instead to the Financial Consumer Agency of Canada website.
- We don’t set the rules and regulations for commercial banks and other financial institutions in Canada. These responsibilities lie with the Office of the Superintendent of Financial Institutions and the federal Department of Finance .
- We don’t issue Canadian coins, see the Royal Canadian Mint website.
- We don’t exchange foreign bank notes. Visit a foreign exchange bureau or a financial institution.
If we haven’t answered your question, you can contact us online , by telephone , or by mail .
If your question is related to unclaimed bank balances or Canada Savings Bonds, contact the Unclaimed Properties Office .
Please complete the following form.
Bank of Canada 234 Wellington Street Ottawa, ON, K1A 0G9
Monday to Friday 8:30 to 17:00 (ET) Toll-free, North America: 1‑800‑303‑1282 Outside North America: 613‑782‑8111
